payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Square wall-mounted picture frame with a thin black outer frame, white mat with a narrow blue inner border, and a central sailboat print under glass showing a small reflection; lower-right of the frame is partially occluded/cropped by a brown object; estimated camera distance ~1.2 m.
attributes: white mat with blue inner border
